hero.title: Your clinic, smarter
hero.description: With Mediflow, every detail of your clinic lives in one unified system: patient records, appointments, labs & imaging, smart prescriptions with drug interaction alerts, a voice AI assistant, a WhatsApp bot, and mobile apps for doctor and patient with push notifications.

booking.subtitle: New appointment request
booking.fullNamePlaceholder: As it should appear on the medical record
booking.notesPlaceholder: Any detail that helps our team prepare your visit
booking.successDesc: We'll contact you shortly to confirm your appointment

services.title: Our main services
services.subtitle: Pick a service from the booking form or contact us for guidance.
services.defaultDesc: Service available for online booking or through our reception team.

auth.loginSubtitle: Sign in to access your account
auth.forgotHint: If your account is not active, contact the clinic.
auth.registerSubtitle: Fill in your info to open a patient account
auth.infoSubtitle: Everything you need, directly available, without clutter.
auth.info1Desc: Use patient ID, phone or email.
auth.info2Desc: If you don't have an account yet, create one from this portal.

dashboard.tagline: Track your appointments, results and prescriptions all in one place.
dashboard.quickSummaryDesc: The essentials at a glance, without jumping around.
dashboard.filesCenterDesc: Prescriptions, labs and imaging at a glance.

appointments.title: My appointments
appointments.subtitle: Quick view of upcoming appointments with fast access to modify or cancel.
appointments.addNewDesc: Pick the service and the time that suits you. The appointment will be linked to your account.
appointments.reminder1: The appointment time may be slightly adjusted by the clinic to match the doctor's schedule.
appointments.reminder2: You can follow the appointment status from "My appointments".
appointments.reminder3: You can cancel an appointment via the portal up to 6 hours before.
appointments.selectService: The service helps the clinic estimate the visit duration.
appointments.branchHint: The branch you want to visit.
appointments.dateHint: Pick a time within the clinic's working hours.

queue.title: Queue status
queue.subtitle: See your number, who's currently served and how many people are ahead of you.
queue.quickSummaryDesc: Your number helps you track your position directly.
queue.noQueue: No one ahead of you. You may be called at any moment.
queue.completedDesc: Number of cases completed before your turn.
queue.statusDesc: Updated when you reload the page.
queue.noteDesc: Numbers are indicative and follow the clinic's daily appointment order. They may change based on case complexity, delays or priorities.
queue.noEntryDesc: Your number will appear here after you check in at the clinic.

medicalFile.title: My medical file
medicalFile.subtitle: Review your medical history, visits, procedures and referrals recorded at the clinic.
medicalFile.name: Name
medicalFile.quickHealthDesc: Key info for the doctor or reception
medicalFile.noSummary: Not enough medical details in your file yet.
medicalFile.last50: Last 50 visits recorded at the clinic

timeline.title: Timeline of your medical file
timeline.subtitle: Unified sequence of appointments, prescriptions, labs, imaging, procedures and follow-ups.

account.title: My account
account.subtitle: Your profile details and quick settings shortcuts.
account.notificationsDesc: View your latest alerts and mark them as read.
account.medicalFileDesc: Review your records, prescriptions and reports.
account.backHomeDesc: Return to your main portal overview.
